2604.06674.title: Between Century and Poet: Graph-Based Lexical Semantic Change in Persian Poetry
2604.06674.paper_summary: Meaning in Persian poetry is both historical and relational. Words persist through literary tradition while shifting their force through changing constellations of neighbors, rhetorical frames, and poetic voices. This study examines that process using aligned Word2Vec spaces combined with graph-based neighborhood analysis across centuries and major poets. Rather than modeling semantic change as vector displacement alone, it treats lexical history as the rewiring of local semantic graphs: the gain and loss of neighbors, shifts in bridge roles, and movement across communities. The analysis centers on twenty target words, anchored by five recurrent reference terms: Earth, Night, two wine terms, and Heart. Surrounding them are affective, courtly, elemental, and Sufi concepts such as Love, Sorrow, Dervish, King, Annihilation, and Truth. These words exhibit distinct patterns of change. Night is more time-sensitive, Earth more poet-sensitive, and Heart shows continuity despite graph-role mobility. The two wine terms highlight probe sensitivity: one is broad and semantically diffuse, while the other is narrower and more stable. A lexical audit confirms that the corpus contains historically driven terms, poet-specific usages, and sparsely attested mystical vocabulary requiring caution. Overall, semantic change in Persian poetry is better captured as neighborhood rewiring than as abstract drift. For Digital Humanities, this approach restores local structure to computational analysis and supports interpretations closer to literary practice: persistence, migration, mediation, and selective transformation.
2604.06674.paper_summary_zh: 波斯詩歌中的意義既是歷史性的，也是關係性的。<lb/>詞語透過文學傳統持續存在，同時在鄰近詞語、修辭框架和詩歌聲音的變化中改變其力量。<lb/>本研究通過對齊的Word2Vec空間結合跨世紀及主要詩人的基於圖的鄰域分析來檢視這一過程。<lb/>它不僅將語義變化建模為向量位移，而是將詞彙歷史視為局部語義圖的重新連接：鄰居的增減、橋樑角色的轉變以及社群之間的移動。<lb/>分析集中於二十個目標詞，並以五個重複出現的參考詞作為基礎：地球、夜晚、兩個與酒相關的詞以及心。<lb/>圍繞它們的是情感的、宮廷的、元素的和蘇非的概念，如愛、悲傷、達爾維什、國王、消亡和真理。<lb/>這些詞語展示了明顯的變化模式。<lb/>夜晚對時間更敏感，地球對詩人更敏感，而心儘管在圖角色上有流動性，但仍顯示出連續性。<lb/>這兩個與酒相關的詞突顯了探測敏感性：一個是廣泛且語義擴散的，而另一個則較窄且更穩定。<lb/>詞彙審計確認語料庫包含歷史驅動的詞語、特定詩人的用法，以及需要謹慎對待的稀少的神秘詞彙。<lb/>總體而言，波斯詩歌中的語義變化更適合被捕捉為鄰域的重新連接，而非抽象的漂移。<lb/>對於數位人文學科來說，這種方法恢復了計算分析的局部結構，並支持更接近文學實踐的詮釋：持續性、遷移、調解和選擇性轉變。
2604.06674.author: Kourosh Shahnazari et.al.
2604.06674.authors: Kourosh Shahnazari, Seyed Moein Ayyoubzadeh, Mohammadali Keshtparvar
